title: The Lamb Man
description: A Creepy Horror Mod That Adds The Lamb Man.A Demon That Attacks When You Kill A Mob.
body:
Features
________________________________________________________
the Lamb Man. A Demon That Stalks You (With A 10% Chance) if You Kill An Animal.
Once The Lamb Man Spawns, All Hope Is Lost As He Will Grab You And Not Let Go Until You Are
**Dead**
![An Encounter With The Lamb Man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd5e9049144b9c8d57328d351a6c11199a4ada69.png)

Credits
________________________________________________________
Made by BlueScreen
For the Streamer ItsFillsFR [https://www.youtube.com/@itsfilsfr](https://www.youtube.com/@itsfilsfr)
